sections.subtitle: Current Form
sections.text: Genoa arrives after a series of mixed results, with four draws and a win in their last five matches, while Bologna suffered two losses but remains solid overall. Both teams will look to capitalize on their recent performances.

sections.subtitle: Head-to-Head
sections.text: In the last two encounters, Bologna edged Genoa by winning both matches, showcasing a slight upper hand. However, the matches were closely contested, indicating that today's match could go either way.

sections.subtitle: Strategic Insights
sections.text: Genoa’s struggles with creating and converting chances could be vital, while Bologna's offensive prowess, highlighted by their goal-scoring abilities, will likely dictate the pace of the match.

halftimeSections.subtitle: First half summary
halftimeSections.text: The first half ended with Bologna leading 1-0 courtesy of Lewis Ferguson's goal in the 35th minute. Bologna displayed significant dominance in terms of possession, holding the ball for 64% of the half.

halftimeSections.subtitle: Attack momentum analysis
halftimeSections.text: In the first half, Genoa started strong but quickly lost momentum to Bologna, which subsequently took control. Bologna enjoyed significant attacking spells, particularly between the 10th and 45th minutes, during which they achieved several key shifts in momentum, showcasing their ability to dominate both midfield and the final third.

halftimeSections.subtitle: Home team performance
halftimeSections.text: Genoa struggled to convert their possession into meaningful chances, concluding the half with no shots on target and only creating 12 entries into the penalty area. Their ability to break down Bologna's defense will be crucial in the second half.

halftimeSections.subtitle: Away team strengths
halftimeSections.text: Bologna, on the other hand, successfully created pressure through their swift transitions and effective use of width. Their three shots on target and higher expected goals indicate a more potent attacking threat.
